perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman appears in a circular frame overlay, speaking to the camera. She gestures toward a container filled with various makeup products shown in a top-down view. (2) She transitions to a desk setting where she picks up an I'M MEME color correcting base and applies it to the back of her hand, showing the texture. (3) She repeats this process with several other products including a tinted sunscreen, a CANMAKE eyeliner gel pen, a THE SAME concealer palette, and an I'M MEME contour stick, each time swatching or applying them to her face or hand. (4) She demonstrates the use of a CANMAKE face powder with a puff and applies 4U2 lipstick to her lips. (5) A montage of social media screenshots featuring a FIXX setting spray is shown before she cleans the nozzle and sprays it onto her face. (6) The video ends with the woman smiling and sitting at her desk.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop background music begins and remains continuous throughout the video. A female voice speaks in an energetic and friendly tone in Mandarin Chinese. (2) As the visuals transition between products, subtle sound effects like 'swish' and 'pop' are heard, synchronized with text appearances. (3) The vocal remains the primary focus, maintaining a clear and instructional delivery. (4) The music concludes with a brief, bright electronic flourish as the speech ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '因為我很愛買 很愛試' (Because I love buying and trying) - Hook/Intro. (2) '我有這麼多的彩妝' (I have so much makeup) - Context. (3) '但我最常用的是...' (But what I use most often is...) - Transition. (4) 'I'M MEME 校色妝前乳' (I'M MEME Color Correcting Base) - Functional product name. (5) '紫色：提亮暗沈、蠟黃 / 綠色：修飾泛紅、痘痘' - Functional tips. (6) '防曬潤色EE霜' - Functional product description. (7) 'CANMAKE 眼線膠筆' - Functional product name. (8) '有多滑順!!!' (So smooth!!!) - Emotional/Hook text. (9) 'THE SAME 三色遮瑕膏' - Functional product name. (10) 'I'M MEME 雙頭修容打亮筆' - Functional product name. (11) 'CANMAKE 礦物控油蜜粉(綠)' - Functional product name. (12) '4U2 你我的天鵝絨唇膏' - Functional product name. (13) 'FIXX 定妝噴霧' - Functional product name. (14) '大推!!' (Highly recommend!!) - Emotional hook. (15) '筆記起來了嗎?' (Did you take notes?) - Call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Sequential product demonstrations and swatches -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian female with dark hair styled with colorful hair clips, wearing a black and white overall-style top over a cream shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with a shelf containing books, a clock, and some packaged snacks. A desk in front is cluttered with makeup organizers and products.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, likely using a ring light.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequence of Product Demos -> Social Proof -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly persuasive makeup recommendation tutorial by showing the daily-use essentials of the creator, demonstrating their effectiveness through live swatches and application, and validating them with social media popularity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product demonstrations, clear brand name mentions, positive adjectives, and visual callouts of specific product features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Circular frame overlay for talking head segments, high-density decorative text overlays in a consistent variety-show style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fast-paced editing and beat-synced transitions to maintain high engagement, typical of modern short-form beauty influencers.
